description_long: This object is a compact, ornately decorated shotgun with a short barrel and a wooden grip. The barrel features intricate gold embellishments, giving it a distinctive and luxurious appearance. The receiver and trigger assembly are made of dark metal, contrasting with the polished wood of the handle. The hammer and trigger mechanism are exposed, suggesting a traditional firing system. The overall design is reminiscent of historical or antique firearms, with a focus on both functionality and aesthetic detail. The shotgun's size and styling make it suitable for close-quarters use, often seen in urban or personal defense scenarios.
description: A short, ornately decorated shotgun with a wooden grip and gold-embellished barrel, featuring exposed hammer and trigger mechanisms.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, ornate gold barrel details, and wooden grip.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening and the alignment of the gold decorations.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the hammer, trigger, and the continuation of the gold embellishments.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the wooden grip and the back of the receiver.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short with ornate gold embellishments and no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no finger grooves
